title: Design a coherent retry and timeout budget
description: Compose per-attempt timeouts, retry counts, and backoff so the total stays within the caller's deadline without amplifying load.
body: Steps: 1. Fix the overall deadline the caller can tolerate. 2. Choose a per-attempt timeout and a retry count whose worst-case sum (including backoff) stays under that deadline. 3. Add full jitter to backoff and respect Retry-After. 4. Ensure nested calls do not multiply retries (a retry-of-a-retry storm); propagate a deadline downstream. 5. Pair with a circuit breaker so a failing dependency stops the retries. Rollback point: the policy is config, revert by reverting it. Validation: a worst-case run stays within the deadline and load tests show no retry amplification when the dependency degrades.
